notes: Fix: projection sheet first column text now wraps. Root cause: a global 'th { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; font-size: 10px }' rule was applying to .proj-table tbody th, making 'Savings account balance' render as wide-spaced 'SAVINGS ACCOUNT BALANCE' which couldn't fit in 180px and overflowed into adjacent month columns. Fix: explicitly reset text-transform, letter-spacing, and font-size on .proj-table tbody th to body-text defaults. Now labels render in proper title case at readable size, and overflow-wrap: anywhere kicks in to break long labels into 2-3 lines as needed.
